title: Delete legacy Script-F-Copy variants -- Script-F-Copy.ps1, Script-F-Copy2.ps1, Script-F-ClonedFrom_MainGUI.ps1
description: Three Script-F legacy/copy files exist in scripts/ and are no longer needed: Script-F-Copy.ps1, Script-F-Copy2.ps1, Script-F-ClonedFrom_MainGUI.ps1. These create duplicate function names (P011) and inflate manifest/scan output. Confirm they are not referenced by any import or test, then delete. Check OrphanAudit report to confirm they appear as orphans before removing.
notes: Verify: Select-String -Path **/*.ps1,**/*.psm1 -Pattern 'Script-F-Copy' before deletion. Check OrphanAudit report first.
